title: Aurora, 12772, Bonnie Brown Teddy Bear, 13In, Soft toy, Medium
features: Say hello to Bonnie Bear, 33cm — the softest, sweetest, and most adorable teddy bear from Aurora World! With its heartwarming charm, it’s more than just a plush toy; it’s a lifelong companion that promises endless hugs, comfort, and joy.

Crafted with the utmost care and attention to detail, this brown Bonnie Bear Soft Toy is made from the softest, premium-quality materials. It features a bean-filled bottom for extra-cosy snuggles and tender moments.

Whether you’re a child, teenager, or adult, this 33cm bear is made to be loved by everyone. Suitable from birth, it’s the perfect gift for birthdays, baby showers, anniversaries, or to show someone how much you care.

Bonnie Bear is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and features inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable, with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is dedicated to designing and producing innovative, high-quality plush products — and this charming bear soft toy is no exception. Bring home this delightful teddy and experience the joy of a truly lovable companion.
description: From the manufacturer About Aurora Aurora World was established in 1981 in Seoul, South Korea as a plush design, manufacturing and sourcing business. Since then, our company has grown into one of the world leading plush manufacturer and distributor, achieving worldwide recognition. We now have additional offices in the UK, Los Angeles and Hong Kong. In addition, the company has wholly owned factories in China and Indonesia. As one of the leading global companies within the gift and toy industry, our aim each year is to develop high quality, original and innovative soft toys that really stand out and appeal to all age groups. Our talented design team carry out extensive global market research to create and develop new items based upon latest market trends and crazes. Our team also has the additional capability to create bespoke and promotional items to suit individual customer requirements. Our fun and colourful products appeal to children and adults alike and are suitable for all occasions. Our collections include nursery, wild and domestic animals, teddy bears and a host of other novelty characters.
